analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov claims Russian-speaking populations in Latvia and Estonia face discriminatory policies, including statelessness that deprives them of democratic rights. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 – The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent: Applicable. Latvia and Estonia (Western-aligned states) are portrayed as violating rights and engaging in discriminatory, shameful practices against Russian speakers, casting the West’s allies as immoral and Russia/Russians as victims. RU2 – Alternative system: Not present; no mention of multipolarity or non-Western cooperation. RU3 – Russia benevolent: Not present; no claim of Russia offering help or partnership. RU4 – Russian history admirable: Not present. RU5 – Russia at the forefront: Not present. RU6 – Culture/nature: Not present. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1 only.
